paragraphs: Good momentum — overdue count is down to 46. This is above the 7-day average of 22 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 44 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 3 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention. 3 projects cleared their overdue lists — well done.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 31 days past due with 8 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **19 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $17,751 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 5. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $14,882 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $44,327 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Karim Merchant (JOSE-TEST10):** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** $10,522 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** **9 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Ginger Brown:** **10 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $10,850 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.
**Brandy Sexton (CNG2025-508):** **18 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $14,902 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

260 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **132 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 4 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$106,778 in payments going out this week** across 41 tasks — make sure funds are available. $58,256 expected in from 2 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199) and Ginger Brown — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 2. This needs to turn around today.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 2 overdue — oldest first. **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 31 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 14 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Clean — 3 tasks in progress. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 18 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 2 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Giselle Garcia: Giselle Garcia has 1 overdue across 1 project with 0 tasks active.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Clean — 7 tasks in progress. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **13 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 15 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Brandy Sexton (CNG2025-508):** Clean — 2 tasks in progress. **18 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 32 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 9. Keep the momentum going.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 8 overdue (oldest: 31d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **19 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 38 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 5 overdue — oldest first. **16 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 27 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** 2 overdue — oldest first. **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is completely clean — no overdue tasks. Keep this up.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Clean — 7 tasks in progress. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **13 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 15 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** Clean — 1 tasks in progress. **9 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 15 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Ginger Brown:** Clean — 7 tasks in progress. **10 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 33 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Schedule is clean. Focus on keeping active tasks on track and confirming upcoming deliveries.
